zh.Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾沃爾夫 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Stockhay於大約1339年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Robert de Stockhay65歲，母親Ascara de Pottesford60歲。她於1354年之前與John Beaumont結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1429年2月20日在她的家鄉享年91歲。

zh-hans.Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾沃爾夫 霍爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Stockhay于大约1339年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Robert de Stockhay65岁，母亲Ascara de Pottesford60岁。她于1354年之前与John Beaumont结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1429年2月20日在她的家乡享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stockhay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Stockham in Witheridge (Devon), from Old English stōd ‘stud, herd of horses’ + cumb ‘valley’.
habitational name from Stockham Marsh in Bremhill (Wiltshire), which may derive from Old English stocc ‘tree trunk, stump’ + hamm ‘water meadow’ or hām ‘village, homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Stockhay was born about 1339, in Devon, England, her father, Robert de Stockhay, was 65 and her mother, Ascara de Pottesford, was 60. She married John Beaumont before 1354. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 20 February 1429, in her hometown, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Stockhay est née environ 1339, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Stockhay, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Ascara de Pottesford, avait 60 ans. Elle a épousé John Beaumont avant 1354. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 février 1429, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Stockhay um 1339 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Stockhay 65 und ihre Mutter Ascara de Pottesford 60. Sie hat vor 1354 John Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Februar 1429 im Alter von 91 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Stockhay è nata il circa 1339 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Robert de Stockhay, aveva 65 anni e sua madre, Ascara de Pottesford, aveva 60 anni. Lei sposato John Beaumont prima del 1354. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 febbraio 1429, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Stockhayが約1339年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Robert de Stockhayは65歳，母Ascara de Pottesfordは60歳であった。1354年以前にJohn Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1429年2月20日に故郷で91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Stockhay(이)가 대략 1339년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Stockhay(은)는 65세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ascara de Pottesford(은)는 60세였다. 그녀는 1354년 이전 John Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1429년 2월 20일 그녀의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Stockhay nasceu aproximadamente 1339, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Stockhay, tinha 65 anos e sua mãe, Ascara de Pottesford, tinha 60 anos. Ela casou-se com John Beaumont antes 1354. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1429, em sua cidade natal, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Stockhay родилась около 1339 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Stockhay было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Ascara de Pottesford, 60. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Beaumont перед 1354 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 февраля 1429 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Stockhay nació aproximadamente 1339, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Stockhay, tenía 65 años y su mamá, Ascara de Pottesford, tenía 60 años. Se casó con John Beaumont antes de 1354. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1429, en su pueblo, a la edad de 91 años.
